name: Recipient

wishCards.text: Happiness can be found even in the darkest of times — but today is made entirely of light. Celebrate yourself. You have earned every joy this day brings.
You've got that rare kind of magic that makes everyone feel seen. You don't just walk into a room — you light it up. Happy Birthday! 🪄
In every timeline, there's one person who makes the journey worth it. In this one? That person is you. Never stop being exactly who you are. ✨
The rarest person is one with both kindness and courage. You have both in abundance. May today fill your heart as much as you fill others'.
True character — your kind — is rare. You make everyone around you proud. Celebrate grandly today, you have more than earned it.
Across every enchanted realm — every version of today is celebrating you. Some things are certain across all magic: you are deeply, completely loved. ❤️

storyPanels.caption: And so it began — the day you arrived and the world quietly became a more magical place.
With curiosity like Hermione and courage like Harry — your brilliance grew with every year.
Powerful, graceful, untamed — like a Hippogriff soaring at dawn. That's you.
The greatest superpower? The way you make every person feel seen and loved. That's rare.
The most magical chapter yet — the Birthday. The grand celebration of YOU! 🎉
The best adventures are still ahead. The story never ends, and the magic only grows. 🪄

scratchWish:
May this year bring you
adventures that thrill you,
love that holds you,
laughter that heals you,
and every dream you've dared to dream.

You deserve every bit of it.
Happy Birthday, you magical soul. ❤️✨

letter.title: Happy Birthday, Recipient! 🎂
letter.body:
Dear Recipient,

If the wizarding world had a favourite person — it would be you.

Not because you have magical powers or a wand. But because you have something far rarer: a genuinely warm heart. You show up for people. You make ordinary moments feel like something worth remembering. You laugh in a way that makes other people want to laugh too.

Today, on your birthday, we want you to know this:

You are not ordinary. You never were. You are one of those rare people who leaves every room — every conversation, every chapter — a little warmer than it was before.

So tonight, when the confetti settles and the day quiets down, remember this: you are so deeply, completely, endlessly loved.

The best is absolutely still ahead. This is just the beginning.

Fly high. Dream bigger. Stay exactly who you are. ⚡
letter.signature: — With all our hearts & magic, Your Love 🪄❤️
